body.raw:
# Quick Start

## Examples

- [basic](https://github.com/node-real/bee/tree/main/examples/basic)
- [brand-theme](https://github.com/node-real/bee/tree/main/examples/brand-theme)
- [next](https://github.com/node-real/bee/tree/main/examples/next)

## Notice

To use UIKit, the React version should be in the range `>=16.8 and <18`, we recommend `v17`.

## Installation

In your React project, install UIKit by running the following:

```bash
npm i @totejs/uikit @emotion/react@^11 @emotion/styled@^11 framer-motion@^6
```

To use icons, just install as follow:

```bash
npm i @totejs/icons
```

To use the components that haven't UI specification (e.g. Modal, Popover...), you can install
`@totejs/uikit-plus`

```bash
npm i @totejs/uikit-plus
```
